title: senecio crassiflorus
intro: Senecio crassiflorus, also known as Jerusalem sage or oak leaved geranium, is a shrub-like plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Senecio crassiflorus include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications to benefit from its medicinal properties.
